questions.q: Which company received an Air Operator Certificate from DGCA to become India’s first dedicated commercial seaplane operator?
questions.exp: DGCA granted an AOC to SkyHop Aviation, which plans to become India’s first dedicated commercial seaplane operator.

questions.q: In the first phase, SkyHop Aviation plans to connect five islands of which region with each other and the mainland?
questions.exp: SkyHop will begin by connecting five islands in Lakshadweep with each other and the mainland.

questions.q: NITI Aayog launched which strategic roadmap for India’s next phase of Digital Public Infrastructure?
questions.exp: NITI Aayog launched DPI@2047 for Viksit Bharat to guide India’s next phase of DPI-led growth.

questions.q: The DPI@2047 roadmap aims to align India’s digital growth with the goal of becoming a how much economy by 2047?
questions.exp: The roadmap is aligned with India’s vision of becoming a $30 trillion economy by 2047.

questions.q: Which two organisations partnered with NITI Aayog in developing the DPI@2047 roadmap?
questions.exp: The DPI@2047 roadmap was developed in partnership with EkStep Foundation and Deloitte.

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT one of the five new districts approved in Ladakh?
questions.exp: The five new districts are Nubra, Sham, Changthang, Zanskar and Drass.

questions.q: After the creation of five new districts, Ladakh will now have how many districts in total?
questions.exp: Earlier Ladakh had Leh and Kargil; with five new districts, the total becomes seven.

questions.q: The UAE announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ effective from which date?
questions.exp: The UAE’s withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ became effective from May 1, 2026.

questions.q: What was the primary reason behind the UAE’s withdrawal from OPEC?
questions.exp: The UAE was frustrated with production quotas that restricted its output despite higher production capacity.

questions.q: Flipkart, Axis Bank and PayU launched biometric authentication for card payments using which methods instead of OTP?
questions.exp: Axis Bank cardholders can approve transactions on Flipkart using fingerprint or Face ID instead of OTP.

questions.q: RBI launched Mission SAKSHAM for capacity building of which sector?
questions.exp: Mission SAKSHAM, or Sahkari Bank Kshamta Nirman, is for capacity building of Urban Co-operative Banks.

questions.q: Under Mission SAKSHAM, RBI aims to cover approximately how many participants through training programmes?
questions.exp: The RBI plans training programmes covering about 1 crore 40 lakh participants.

questions.q: Pakistan launched its indigenous EO-3 satellite aboard which rocket?
questions.exp: Pakistan’s EO-3 satellite was launched from China’s Taiyuan Satellite Launch Centre aboard a Long March-6 rocket.

questions.q: The foundation stone for the Google Cloud India AI Hub was laid at which location?
questions.exp: The Google Cloud India AI Hub is being established at Tarluvada, Visakhapatnam in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: Google’s investment for the Google Cloud India AI Hub is valued at how much over five years?
questions.exp: Google will invest $15 billion over 2026-2030, recognised as India’s single largest FDI since independence.

questions.q: Bihar’s first structured pulse procurement initiative was launched under which mission?
options: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Scheme
questions.exp: Bihar’s first structured pulse procurement initiative was launched under the Atmanirbhar Pulses Mission.

questions.q: According to SIPRI’s report ‘Trends in World Military Expenditure, 2025’, India became the world’s ______ largest military spender.
questions.exp: India became the world’s fifth-largest military spender with expenditure of $92.1 billion in 2025.

questions.q: MoSPI proposed creating the Index of Services Production using GST data with which base year?
questions.exp: MoSPI proposed the Index of Services Production for the formal sector using GST data with 2024-25 as the base year.

questions.q: BHEL signed a Licensing Agreement for Transfer of Technology with NSTL-DRDO for which naval system?
options: LM2500 Gas Turbine Infrared Suppression System
questions.exp: The agreement is for fabrication, installation and commissioning of the LM2500 Gas Turbine Infrared Suppression System for naval vessels.

questions.q: The Department of Posts signed an MoU with which company to strengthen logistics and e-commerce operations across India?
questions.exp: The Department of Posts and DTDC Express Limited signed an MoU to use India Post’s network for logistics and parcel delivery.
